sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_tuples (id Int32, values Tuple(Int32, Int32));
UPDATE test_tuples SET values = tupleNegate(values) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, tupleNegate(values) AS negated_values FROM test_tuples;
CREATE TABLE negated_tuples AS SELECT id, tupleNegate(values) AS negated_values FROM test_tuples;
